message:
Fix code review issues: clippy warning and fuzz input size check

1. normalize_command: Use unwrap_or instead of unwrap_or_else
   - Clippy correctly identified that the closure was unnecessary
   - The fallback value (Cow::Borrowed(cmd)) is cheap to construct

2. fuzz_hook_input: Move size limit check to apply to all inputs
   - Previously, size limit only applied to valid UTF-8 inputs
   - Raw byte parsing (line 28) had no size protection
   - Now size check applies unconditionally before any parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
